title: Add Pollinations AI All-in-One Generation to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: The Swiss Army Hive
gist.blurb: A new community app just dropped! 'Pollinations AI All-in-One Generation' lets you spin up images, music, and text all from one cozy interface.
gist.summary: Added 'Pollinations AI All-in-One Generation' to the community app showcase, featuring combined image, audio, and text generation.
gist.impact: Users can now explore a new community-built interface that brings all of Pollinations' core generation capabilities into a single customizable dashboard.
gist.visual_concept: An 'all-in-one' tool metaphor. Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot operating a retro control board that outputs different types of media (art, music, text).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot operating a retro multi-tool control board. The glowing lime green (#ecf874) console has tiny pixel icons for a paintbrush, a musical note, and a text scroll. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot operating a retro multi-tool control board. The glowing lime green (#ecf874) console has tiny pixel icons for a paintbrush, a musical note, and a text scroll. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background.
